title: To God.
content:
Thou hast promis'd, Lord, to be
    With me in my misery;
    Suffer me to be so bold
    As to speak, Lord, say and hold.
meaning:
"To God." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
